meaning: n.荷兰产杜松子酒,任何烈酒
examples: After fortifying himself with schnapps, the Dutchman told his wife about the ghost.
I must have looked bedraggled because the owner promptly gave me two free glasses of schnapps.
This sweet drink is usually made with vodka and apple schnapps, and sometimes contains sweet and sour mix.
Scoff apple strudel and pretzels and taste test your way through the 14, 000 schnapps distilleries.
Losing sight of the stranger for seconds, she took one more pull on the schnapps.
